title: "The Loop" (hyperlane)

[[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]]–[[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]<ref name="Date">"[[Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin]]," which is set during the [[Rebellion era|Rebellion]] and [[New Republic era]]s ([[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]–[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]; see {{Blog|holocron|24|Star Wars Eras}}), establishes that [[Ecclessis Figg/Legends|Ecclessis Figg]] founded "The Loop" [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] some [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] before [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Death/Legends|death]] nearly four [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] prior to the text's setting. "The Loop's" founding can therefore be dated approximately within the hundred-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] span from [[500 BBY/Legends|500 BBY]] to [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]].</ref>

'''"The Loop"''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] located in the [[Yarith sector/Legends|Yarith sector]]. It was a circular route around the [[Kiax Nebula/Legends|Kiax Nebula]] that connected the worlds of [[Lutrillia/Legends|Lutrillia]], [[Mijos/Legends|Mijos]] and [[Shuldene/Legends|Shuldene]]. A portion of "The Loop" was part of the larger [[Lutrillian Cross/Legends|Lutrillian Cross]] hyperlane.

==Description==
"The Loop" was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] located in the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] region of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" /> [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It looped around the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Coreward]] side of the [[Kiax Nebula/Legends|Kiax Nebula]] to link the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Mijos/Legends|Mijos]], [[Shuldene/Legends|Shuldene]], and [[Lutrillia/Legends|Lutrillia]], as well as two other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. In doing so, it passed through the [[Yarith sector/Legends|Yarith]] and [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sectors]], while intersecting with<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" /> the [[Cerean Reach/Legends|Cerean Reach]] at [[Shuldene system/Legends|Shuldene]] and forming a four-way junction with the [[Lutrillian Cross/Legends|Lutrillian Cross]], the [[Koda Spur/Legends|Koda Spur]], and the [[Lutrillia–Darlyn Boda trade route]] at [[Lutrillia system/Legends|Lutrillia]].<ref name="Atlas" />
